# Minesweeper Game Application

An accessible, high-performance web implementation of the classic Minesweeper puzzle game built using React, Vite, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features custom difficulty adjustments and a state-rollback system.

## Source Architecture

- [Main Application Hub Component](./src/pages/Home.tsx): Coordinates the primary game loop, manages recursive board disclosure routines, and tracks historical state modifications.
- [Tile Rendering Component](./src/components/TileComponent.tsx): Handles individual cell layouts, click mechanisms, context menu flagging, and asset styling.
- [TypeScript Definitions](./src/types/Types.ts): Contains explicit interfaces for state variables and game structures.

## Functional Utilities

- [Board Generators](./src/utils/createBoard.ts): Builds the multi-dimensional grid array and randomizes initial item offsets.
- [Neighbor Calculation Utilities](./src/utils/nearbyTiles.ts): Computes vector arrays for matching cell groupings surrounding coordinates.
- [Validation Handlers](./src/utils/checkWin.ts): Automated algorithms running checks to instantly evaluate final win/loss state criteria.
